criteria.name: No hardcoded values
criteria.prompt: Review the source code in src/ for hardcoded magic strings, numbers, ports, URLs, or configuration values that should be in environment variables or config files. Score 1 if clean, 0 if violations found.

criteria.name: Integration test exists
criteria.prompt: Check if there's at least one test that makes actual HTTP requests to the running app (using supertest, fetch, or similar). Score 1 if found, 0 if only isolated unit tests.

criteria.name: Test isolation
criteria.prompt: Review the test files for shared mutable state between tests, missing cleanup/teardown, or test order dependencies. Score 1 if tests are properly isolated, 0 if not.

criteria.name: Error path tests
criteria.prompt: Check if tests cover error scenarios: 404 routes, invalid input, server errors. Score 1 if error paths are tested, 0 if only happy path.

criteria.name: Security headers
criteria.prompt: Check if the app uses security headers middleware (Helmet.js, hono/secure-headers, or manual headers for CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options). Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: CORS configured
criteria.prompt: Check if CORS is explicitly configured (not wildcard * in production). Score 1 if properly configured, 0 if missing or wildcard.

criteria.name: Rate limiting
criteria.prompt: Check if any rate limiting middleware is configured on routes. Score 1 if present, 0 if absent.

criteria.name: Input validation
criteria.prompt: Check if request input validation is implemented (Zod, Valibot, Joi, class-validator, or manual validation). Score 1 if present, 0 if requests are used without validation.

criteria.name: Error sanitization
criteria.prompt: Check if production error responses are sanitized (no stack traces, internal paths, or sensitive details leaked). Score 1 if sanitized, 0 if raw errors exposed.

criteria.name: Graceful shutdown
criteria.prompt: Check if SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers exist for graceful shutdown with connection draining. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Structured logging
criteria.prompt: Check if structured logging is configured (pino, winston, or similar producing JSON logs with level, timestamp, request-id). Score 1 if structured, 0 if console.log only.

criteria.name: Request ID propagation
criteria.prompt: Check if unique request IDs are generated per request and propagated through logs/responses. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Global error handler
criteria.prompt: Check if there's a global error handling middleware that catches unhandled errors and unhandled promise rejections. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Request timeout configured
criteria.prompt: Check if request timeouts are configured to prevent infinite hanging requests. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Lint step in CI
criteria.prompt: Check if the CI configuration includes a linting step. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Type check in CI
criteria.prompt: Check if the CI configuration includes a TypeScript type checking step (tsc --noEmit or equivalent). Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Test step in CI
criteria.prompt: Check if the CI configuration includes a test execution step. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Coverage in CI
criteria.prompt: Check if the CI configuration uploads or reports test coverage. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Security scan in CI
criteria.prompt: Check if the CI configuration includes a dependency audit, SAST tool, or security scanning step. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Meaningful commit messages
criteria.prompt: Review git log for lazy messages like 'fix', 'update', 'wip', 'asdf'. Score 1 if messages are descriptive, 0 if lazy.

criteria.name: Atomic commits
criteria.prompt: Review git log --stat for commits that change too many unrelated files. Score 1 if commits are focused, 0 if monolithic.

criteria.name: Memory leak check
criteria.prompt: Review code for common memory leak patterns: unbounded caches, event listener accumulation, large closures in loops. Score 1 if clean, 0 if risks found.

criteria.name: Connection pooling ready
criteria.prompt: Check if the code structure supports connection pooling (even without a DB — factory pattern, singleton services, proper cleanup). Score 1 if structured for it, 0 if ad-hoc.

criteria.name: Compression enabled
criteria.prompt: Check if response compression (gzip/brotli) middleware is configured. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Cache headers
criteria.prompt: Check if appropriate Cache-Control headers are set on responses. Score 1 if present, 0 if missing.

criteria.name: Non-obvious code comments
criteria.prompt: Review source code for comments that explain WHY decisions were made (not WHAT the code does). Score 1 if good comments exist, 0 if no explanatory comments.

criteria.name: Error code catalog
criteria.prompt: Check if error response codes and their meanings are documented (in code, API docs, or README). Score 1 if documented, 0 if ad-hoc errors.
